description_long: This house features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and a combination of open and enclosed spaces. The exterior is primarily composed of white and gray walls, accented by vertical wooden slats that provide both shade and visual interest. Large glass doors and windows are present at the front, allowing natural light to flood the interior and offering a seamless connection to the outside. The layout includes a central open courtyard or patio area, visible wooden decking, and a ramp leading to the main entrance. There are several distinct zones, including what appears to be a living area, private rooms, and a possible garage or utility space. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor-indoor integration.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and gray walls, wooden slat accents, and large glass entry. Features open and enclosed spaces with a central patio and ramped entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden slat accent wall, ramped entry, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the central open patio, wooden deck, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the long, flat roof and the extended white wall enclosing the structure.
description_view_3: Front view with the main glass entryway, vertical wooden slats, and the ramp leading to the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a wide glass door, vertical wooden slat screen, and a ramped approach with no steps or porch.
